---
# Copyright © 2023-2026 ValidMind Inc. All rights reserved.
# Refer to the LICENSE file in the root of this repository for details.
# SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0 AND ValidMind Commercial
title: "Manage document template library
date: last-modified
aliases:
  - /guide/view-documentation-templates.html
  - /guide/documentation/view-documentation-templates.html
  - /guide/templates/view-documentation-templates.html
  - /guide/templates/manage-document-templates.html
---

Manage the templates available to your organization for each document type.

::: {.attn}

## Prerequisites

- [x] {{< var link.login >}}
- [x] To swap between templates or template versions, more than one template or version must exist for that document type.[^1]
- [x] You are a [{{< fa hand >}} Customer Admin]{.bubble}, or assigned another role with sufficient permissions to manage document templates.[^2]

:::

## View document templates

{{< include /guide/templates/_view-document-templates.qmd >}}

## Create document templates

### Add document templates

{{< include /guide/templates/_create-document-templates.qmd >}}

### Duplicate document templates

{{< include /guide/templates/_duplicate-document-templates.qmd >}}

## Delete document templates

::: {.callout-important title="Template deletion is permanent and cannot be undone."}

- Deleting a template deletes all versions of that template.[^7]
- Templates can only be deleted if they are not in use by any documents.
:::

Delete templates no longer required by your organization:

1. In the left sidebar, click **{{< fa gear >}} Settings**.

2.  Under {{< fa file >}} Documents, select **Templates**.

3. Select one of the tabs for the document type with the templates you want to remove:

   - **Development**[^8]
   - **Validation**[^9]
   - **Monitoring**[^10]
   - **Custom**[^11]

4. Select the template you would like to delete by clicking on it.

   Review the details of the template to confirm the template is no longer required.[^12]

5. Click **Delete Template** to remove that template.

6. Click **Yes, Delete Template** to confirm permanent deletion of that template.


<!-- FOOTNOTES -->

[^1]: [Manage document types](manage-document-types.qmd)

[^2]: [Manage permissions](/guide/configuration/manage-permissions.qmd)



[^7]: [Customize document templates](customize-document-templates.qmd#edit-template-outlines)

[^8]: [Working with documentation](/guide/documentation/working-with-documentation.qmd)

[^9]: [Preparing validation reports](/guide/validation/preparing-validation-reports.qmd)

[^10]: [Ongoing monitoring](/guide/monitoring/ongoing-monitoring.qmd)

[^11]: [Managing documents](/guide/templates/managing-documents.qmd)

[^12]:

   [View document templates](#view-document-templates)<br></br>

    **To delete a template without reviewing template details:**<br></br>

    a. Hover over the template until the **{{< fa ellipsis-vertical >}}** menu appears, then click on it.
    b. Select [**{{< fa trash-can >}} Delete**]{.red}.
